title: cephalanthera longibracteata
intro: Cephalanthera longibracteata, also known as the long-bracted Helleborine, is a species of orchid native to Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, including coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
